summary: Version 2.23.1 of the driver is missing the net472 target framework
description: Build CI script need to be updated to include net472 binaries into the package.

summary: Consider adding EmbedUntrackedSources for a build process
description:
This is a continuation of CSHARP-2088. 
The sourceLink github [page|https://github.com/dotnet/sourcelink/blob/main/docs/README.md#embedallsources] says:

{code:java}
Set EmbedUntrackedSources to true to instruct the build system to embed project source files that are not tracked by the source control or imported from a source package to the generated PDB.
{code}
 
At the very least this option affects adding files like "AssemblyInfo.cs" and "AssemblyAttributes.cs", that are not under source control, to the .pdb files.
However we're not sure that settings this option is 100% safe in all possible cases. So we postpone this change until we will figure it out (in the scope of this ticket).

Avoiding this option also leads to warning in a package description:
 !image-2021-12-13-23-46-58-461.png|thumbnail! 
so it's probably better to solve it in one or another way.

summary: Investigate Security Vulnerability in 1.11 API Documentation
description:
* The Info Sec team found a vulnerability in the API [docs |https://mongodb.github.io/mongo-csharp-driver/1.11/apidocs/]for our 1.11 version of the driver where they are able to perform cross site scripting 
 * We need to either fix the issue (if its a quick fix) or take this page down (There are no significant active users of this version of the driver)
 * Remove redirect Links pointing to these docs

summary: Pass OS variable to run-plain-auth-tests.sh
description:
- Fixes .NET8 installation issue with Plain Auth tests on M1
- Simplifies EG script.

summary: BsonDocument.DeepClone() fails on documents with duplicate element names
Use less memory without scope capturing
description:
[JsonWriter.EscapedString implementation |https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-csharp-driver/blob/b473de06f9bf3587b3a00f52ba2678d9aed71d74/src/MongoDB.Bson/IO/JsonWriter.cs#L708]uses anonymous function that touches instance private method - forces compiler to capture scope with 'this' for each =\

We [can switch from .All LINQ to hand written method|https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-csharp-driver/pull/349] to avoid object allocation each time method called (super-often).

Thanks.

summary: Driver home page needs big "Latest documentation" button
description:
The page [http://mongodb.github.io/mongo-csharp-driver/] is missing some easy links to the latest documentation (like the Java driver page does)

I would recommend in "Alternatively, head over to our documentation to learn more about getting started with .NET and MongoDB."  that "our documentation" is also a link. 

Also, there should be a button "Latest documentation" that links to [http://mongodb.github.io/mongo-csharp-driver/2.7/] 

See [https://mongodb.github.io/mongo-java-driver/] for an example.

summary: Add documentation warning against the use of duplicate key names
description: See DRIVERS-612 for details.

summary: Re-enable failing command monitoring tests on 4.2
description:
The following command monitoring tests are failing on 4.1 latest build:
 * A successful insert many command with write errors
 * A successful insert one command with write errors

due to a new field in the writeErrors documents describing the key pattern of the duplicate key violation. This ticket tracks both the disabling and re-enabling of these tests.

summary: Improve serverless tests to obtain secrets from vault
description: Currently serverless tests are failing because we have 2 different serverless group, but only one set of secrets stored as EG project variables. There is better way to handle secrets by retrieving them from vault. Such approach let us have as many sets of secrets as we need by specifying vault name.

summary: Filters with boolean fields or properties should use correct representation of true
Properly dispose of classes implementing IDisposable
description:
From our Coverity analysis, all the high impact issues reported in the src directory of the driver were from not properly disposing of classes implementing IDisposable. We need to properly dispose those classes in the following use cases in the driver.

MongoDB.Driver.Core.Authentication.Oidc.AzureOidcCallback::GetOidcAccessToken()

MongoDB.Driver.Encryption.LibMongoCryptControllerBase::ProcessReadyState()
MongoDB.Driver.Encryption.LibMongoCryptControllerBase::ProcessNeedMongoKeysStateAsync()

MongoDB.Driver.Encryption.AutoEncryptionLibMongoCryptController::ProcessNeedMongoMarkingsState()
MongoDB.Driver.Encryption.AutoEncryptionLibMongoCryptController::ProcessNeedMongoMarkingsStateAsync()



MongoDB.Driver.Encryption.AutoEncryptionLibMongoCryptController::ProcessNeedCollectionInfoState()
MongoDB.Driver.Encryption.AutoEncryptionLibMongoCryptController::ProcessNeedCollectionInfoStateAsync()

summary: Onboard .NET (C#, etc.) Drivers to Papertrail Service for SSDLC Compliance
description:
{*}Motivation{*}
The Papertrail service has recently become generally available for all teams to use as part of their normal publishing workflow. Papertrail was created to support the [Authorized Publication SSDLC policy requirement|https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yRbq_LZLn9vq4PzqWFqe9-zyhC97B3-mr_LiCKVuJrc/edit#bookmark=id.ql3spzj37dw3]. If you use Papertrail to trace all release artifacts, you are fully compliant with this policy.

 

You may close this ticket as Won’t Do if you don’t plan to use the Papertrail service, which means you will be expected to comply with go/ssdlc-policy by populating the documentation manually. 

 

*What is Papertrail?*

TLDR: Papertrail is a service that allows product teams to track various bits of release metadata per artifact that they publish, operated by the DevProd Release Infrastructure team. For details, we recommend [reading our Papertrail documentation|https://docs.devprod.prod.corp.mongodb.com/papertrail] 

{*}How do I use Papertrail?{*}
If your product uses Evergreen to trigger product releases:
 * Use the new papertrail.trace command to interact with this service. You may use [this reference commit to the Java driver|https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-java-driver/commit/bec3def372c9500fbe4d347a4f2414d377679da4] as an example of how to use this command in your project.
 * Since Papertrail is an authenticated service, when you’re ready to use this service, request credentials by go/create-issue for DEVPROD with “Release Infrastructure” Service selected titled “Papertrail Service Credentials needed”.

If your product does not use Evergreen to trigger product releases:
 * You will not be able to communicate with Papertrail by default due to network security requirements. Please reach out by filing a DEVPROD ticket for “Release Infrastructure” service, so that we can work on possible solutions with you (which may include procuring a static IP address for your builds or running a separate task in Evergreen).

 

We welcome all questions about this service or general release questions in #ask-devprod-release-tools.

summary: Enable unit tests that are not being run
description: We're currently suppressing warning xUnit1000 (https://xunit.github.io/xunit.analyzers/rules/xUnit1000.html) This warning indicates that one or more test classes are not public (and are therefore not being run). This is not a regression since under the old version of xUnit these tests were also not being run. The fix simply should be to make the relevant classes public and to remove the warning suppression from the projects afterwards.

summary: FullDocument of the ChangeStreamDocument<TDocument> should not throw on BsonNull
description:
h4. Summary

_Please provide a clear and concise description of the bug._

_Property *FullDocument* of the *ChangeStreamDocument<TDocument>* does throw an exception if the underyling value of *fullDocument* is of type {*}BsonNull{*}._ 

There is a very similar property called FullDocumentBeforeChange that also has similar functionality, but it has an additional check for {*}BsonNull{*}. I think _*FullDocument* just lacks this check._

 

_The exception is the following:_

_System.InvalidCastException: 'Unable to cast object of type '{*}MongoDB.Bson.BsonNull{*}' to type '{*}MongoDB.Bson.BsonDocument{*}'.'_
h4. Please provide the version of the driver. If applicable, please provide the MongoDB server version and topology (standalone, replica set, or sharded cluster).

 

driver versions: 2.24 and 2.25.

replica set consists of 3 simple containerized instances of version 7.0 

 
h4. How to Reproduce

_Steps to reproduce. If possible, please include a [Short, Self Contained, Correct (Compilable), Example|http://sscce.org/]._

 

_Try to retrieve ChancheStreamDocument<BsonDocument> from the actual stream or create the document manually (easier to set up). The idea is to set fullDocument and fullDocumentBeforeChange the properties in BackingDocument to BsonNull._

 

_Example of the second approach (manual creation of ChangeStreamDocument<BsonDocument>):_

_Try to create a ChangeStreamDocument<BsonDocument> and initialize it with a BsonDocument with {"{*}fullDocument{*}", BsonNull.Value },_
    _{"{*}fullDocumentBeforeChange{*}", BsonNull.Value } (as shown below). Later, check its FullDocumentBeforeChange (should be no error) and FullDocument (should be erroneous)._

 
{code:java}
var bsonDocumentSerializer = BsonSerializer.SerializerRegistry.GetSerializer<BsonDocument>();
var csd = new ChangeStreamDocument<BsonDocument>(new BsonDocument()
{
    {"fullDocument", BsonNull.Value },
    {"fullDocumentBeforeChange", BsonNull.Value }
}, bsonDocumentSerializer);
var fullDocBeforeChange = csd.FullDocumentBeforeChange;   // <----- no error
var fullDocAfterChange = csd.FullDocument;     // <----- InvalidCastException

{code}
 

 

_Either_ 
h4. Additional Background

_Please provide any additional background information that may be helpful in diagnosing the bug._

summary: Support string concatenation of mixed types
description:
The following string concatenation expressions involving mixed types and implied conversions to string should be supported:

{code:java}
.Select(x => x.A + 2)
.Select(x => 1 + x.B)
{code}
 
where A and B are properties of type string.

Similar scenarios with more than two operands should also be supported.

summary: Coverity analysis defect 139566: Explicit null dereferenced
description:
Explicit null dereferenced

 A null pointer exception will occur. Dereference of an explicit null value
/src/MongoDB.Driver/Linq/Linq3Implementation/Translators/ExpressionToAggregationExpressionTranslators/MemberInitExpressionToAggregationExpressionTranslator.cs:46: FORWARD_NULL 139566 Assigning: "creatorMapParameters" = "null".
/src/MongoDB.Driver/Linq/Linq3Implementation/Translators/ExpressionToAggregationExpressionTranslators/MemberInitExpressionToAggregationExpressionTranslator.cs:52: FORWARD_NULL 139566 Accessing length of null array "creatorMapParameters".

summary: Coverity analysis defect 127530: Dereference after null check
description:
Dereference after null check

 Either the check against null is unnecessary, or there may be a null reference exception. Reference is checked against null but then dereferenced anyway
/src/MongoDB.Driver/Linq/Linq3Implementation/Ast/Visitors/AstNodeVisitor.cs:92: FORWARD_NULL 127530 Comparing "newNode" to null implies that "newNode" might be null.
/src/MongoDB.Driver/Linq/Linq3Implementation/Ast/Visitors/AstNodeVisitor.cs:94: FORWARD_NULL 127530 Calling a method on null object "newNode".

summary: Coverity analysis defect 127478: Null value leads to thrown exception
description:
Null value leads to thrown exception

 An exception is thrown due to a null value. A null value is passed to a function that throws an exception in that case
/src/MongoDB.Driver/Linq/Linq3Implementation/Ast/Expressions/AstSortArrayExpression.cs:70: FORWARD_NULL 127478 Comparing "fields" to null implies that "fields" might be null.

summary: Coverity analysis defect 127428: Explicit null dereferenced
description:
Explicit null dereferenced

 A null pointer exception will occur. Dereference of an explicit null value
/src/MongoDB.Driver/Linq/Linq3Implementation/Translators/ExpressionToAggregationExpressionTranslators/MethodTranslators/WindowMethodToAggregationExpressionTranslator.cs:287: FORWARD_NULL 127428 Assigning: "selectorTranslation" = "null".
/src/MongoDB.Driver/Linq/Linq3Implementation/Translators/ExpressionToAggregationExpressionTranslators/MethodTranslators/WindowMethodToAggregationExpressionTranslator.cs:323: FORWARD_NULL 127428 Calling a method on null object "selectorTranslation".

summary: Coverity analysis defect 127277: Dereference before null check
description:
Dereference before null check

 There may be a null reference exception, or else the comparison against null is unnecessary. All paths that lead to this null pointer comparison already dereference the pointer earlier
/src/MongoDB.Driver/Linq/Linq3Implementation/Ast/Expressions/AstMapExpression.cs:55: REVERSE_INULL 127277 Directly dereferencing "this._as".
/src/MongoDB.Driver/Linq/Linq3Implementation/Ast/Expressions/AstMapExpression.cs:55: REVERSE_INULL 127277 Null-checking "this._as" suggests that it may be null, but it has already been dereferenced on all paths leading to the check.

summary: Coverity analysis defect 127372: Explicit null dereferenced
description:
Explicit null dereferenced

 A null pointer exception will occur. Dereference of an explicit null value
/src/MongoDB.Driver/Linq/Linq3Implementation/Translators/ExpressionToAggregationExpressionTranslators/MethodTranslators/WindowMethodToAggregationExpressionTranslator.cs:449: FORWARD_NULL 127372 Assigning: "sortBy" = "null".

summary: Coverity analysis defect 127492: Unintentional integer overflow
description:
Unintentional integer overflow

 The expression's value may not be what the programmer intended, because the expression is evaluated using a narrow (i.e. few bits) integer type. An integer overflow occurs, with the result converted to a wider integer type
/src/MongoDB.Driver.GridFS/GridFSForwardOnlyDownloadStream.cs:277: OVERFLOW_BEFORE_WIDEN 127492 Potentially overflowing expression "previousBatch.Count * this.FileInfo.ChunkSizeBytes" with type "int" (32 bits, signed) is evaluated using 32-bit arithmetic, and then used in a context that expects an expression of type "long" (64 bits, signed).

summary: Coverity analysis defect 102903: Data race condition
description:
Data race condition

 The value of the shared data will be determined by the interleaving of thread execution. Thread shared data is accessed without holding an appropriate lock, possibly causing a race condition
/src/MongoDB.Driver/MongoUrl.cs:651: GUARDED_BY_VIOLATION 102903 Accessing "MongoDB.Driver.MongoUrl.__cache" without holding lock "MongoDB.Driver.MongoUrl.__staticLock". Elsewhere, "MongoDB.Driver.MongoUrl.__cache" is written to with "MongoDB.Driver.MongoUrl.__staticLock" held 2 out of 3 times.

summary: Coverity analysis defect 102658: Dereference after null check
description:
Dereference after null check

 Either the check against null is unnecessary, or there may be a null reference exception. Reference is checked against null but then dereferenced anyway
/src/MongoDB.Driver.Core/Core/Operations/BulkWriteBatchResult.cs:147: FORWARD_NULL 102658 Comparing "writeConcernResult" to null implies that "writeConcernResult" might be null.
/src/MongoDB.Driver.Core/Core/Operations/BulkWriteBatchResult.cs:173: FORWARD_NULL 102658 Calling a method on null object "writeConcernResult".

summary: Coverity analysis defect 127214: Dereference null return value
description:
Dereference null return value

 If the function actually returns a null reference, a null reference exception will occur. Return value of function which returns null is dereferenced without checking
/src/MongoDB.Bson/Serialization/Serializers/BsonClassMapSerializer.cs:438: NULL_RETURNS 127214 Assigning: "memberMap" = "null" return value from "GetMemberMapForElement".
/src/MongoDB.Bson/Serialization/Serializers/BsonClassMapSerializer.cs:439: NULL_RETURNS 127214 Calling a method on null object "memberMap".
